x-component.description: Align text units in two id-based files (e.g. Java properties). Expects: filter events. Sends back: filter events.

tmxOutputPath.description: Full path of the output TMX file
tmxOutputPath.title: TMX output path

generateTMX.description: If generateTMX is false generate bilingual TextUnits, otherwise (true) output a TMX file
generateTMX.title: Generate a TMX file:

replaceWithSource.description: If no target text is available, use the source text
replaceWithSource.title: Fall back to source text

copyToTarget.description: Copy to/over the target (an annotation will still be created if requested). WARNING: Copied target will not be segmented and any exisiting target will be lost.
copyToTarget.title: Copy to/over the target (WARNING: Copied target will not be segmented)

storeAsAltTranslation.description: Store the matched target as an alternate translation so that subsequent steps can see it.
storeAsAltTranslation.title: Create an alternate translation annotation

suppressTusWithNoTarget.description: Do not pass on any TUs for which no targets could be found.
suppressTusWithNoTarget.title: Suppress TUs with no target

useTextUnitIds.description: Align based on TextUnit IDs, rather than resource names.
useTextUnitIds.title: Align based on TextUnit IDs
